use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms and modals
Loading state indicators during async operations
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbars and tooltips
Multi-size button hierarchies for visual emphasis
ai_summary: A versatile button component built with Radix UI Slot and CVA variants, featuring four visual variants (primary, secondary, tertiary, ghost) and multiple sizes including icon-only options. Supports loading states and leading/trailing Lucide icons with smooth 80ms transitions and rounded-full styling. Designed for flexible integration across SaaS, e-commerce, and dev tool interfaces.
